CustomField.description: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the how to apply text here. Example: If you are interested in homes for rent in Cooper Towers, click to submit a Cooper Towers Preliminary Submission...
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If you want a custom "How to Apply" section on this development's page on the website, enter the how to apply text here. Example: If you are interested in homes for rent in Cooper Towers, click to submit a Cooper Towers Preliminary Submission...
CustomField.label: Custom Pre-app Text
